'''Plin Shardona''' was a young [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agent and a member of the [[Sandwind Team (Sriluur)|Sandwind Team]] on [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]].

He was in charge of field procurement for the group's missions.

{{Char-stub}}
